name: Garstil
title: Recruitment Officer
abilityWindow: When a player draws a card
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to place that card on the bottom of corresponding deck and draw another card from the top of that deck instead. If that player is another player, gain 1 commodity.

name: Nokash
title: Architect
abilityText: Exhaust this card to allow a player to destroy all their infantry on 1 planet they control. For each infantry destroyed, that player gains 1 commodity. Then, that player converts all of their commodities to trade goods.

name: Zhroth Khuvad
title: Khuvad Arms C.E.O.
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow the active player to gain 1 non-faction unit upgrade technology until the end of this tactical action. At the end of this tactical action, they must return that card to their technology deck.

name: Maertin Donaais
title: Esteemed Philanthropist
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to convert that player's commodities to trade goods; if that player was another player, gain 2 commodities or draw 1 action card.

name: Razalka Gris
title: Ghost Squadron
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to choose 1 system; until the end of movement, other players' ships in that system do not affect ships' movement.

name: Magruda
title: Orator
abilityWindow: When a player exhausts a planet during the agenda phase
abilityText: Exhaust this card to allow that player to treat the combined value of that planet's resources and influence as if it were resources or influence. Then, ready that planet.
notes: Not automated in the bot yet. You can add votes with the modify votes button before final submission, and ready planet and exhaust agent with slash commands.

name: Keda Demas
title: Rose of Kaltrim
abilityWindow: After a player resolves the secondary ability of the "Politics" strategy card
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to gain 1 command token. If that player was another player, look at the top card of the agenda deck; you may discard that card.

name: Drift-Yol Khas
title: The Rat
abilityText: Exhaust this card to allow 1 player to place up to 2 neutral destroyers or 1 neutral cruiser in a system that is in or adjacent to a system that contains their units; resolve space combat in that system.

name: Liu
title: Court of Stars
abilityWindow: When a player would resolve the secondary ability of a strategy card
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to resolve the secondary ability of any exhausted strategy card instead.

name: Reides Lupaat
title: Gifted Telepath
abilityWindow: Once during each of your turns
abilityText: You may look at the top card of 1 non-objective common deck; you may spend 1 trade good or 1 commodity to place that card on the bottom of that deck.

name: Avhkan
title: The Crow
abilityWindow: At the start of ground combat on a planet you control
abilityText: You may destroy 1 infantry on that planet
unlockCondition: ACTION: Destroy 2 of your infantry on each of 5 planets.

name: Ghaist Asmora
title: Paramilitary Liaison
abilityText: If you won a combat during that action, you may perform an additional action.

name: Baird Feraux
title: Reserved Strategist
abilityText: One of your units may reroll 1 of its combat dice; if your opponent controls more units participating in that combat than you, one of your units may roll 1 additional combat die instead.

name: Ciphus Gault
title: Mercenary Demon
abilityWindow: When one of your units would make a combat roll:
abilityText: You may use that unit's ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE instead. You cannot use this ability during the first round of space combat.
unlockCondition: Have 1 superweapon in your play area.

name: Ordagka
title: Maker
abilityWindow: Once per agenda phase, after an agenda is revealed
abilityText: You may predict aloud an outcome of that agenda. If you do not vote on that agenda, and your prediction is correct, gain 1 command token.
unlockCondition: Cast more votes for an outcome than any other player.

name: Dain Thatch
title: Lord Regent
abilityText: If the result is 1, you may reroll that die. You cannot reroll the new result.
unlockCondition: Have the Kaltrim Crown on your faction sheet.

name: Yuri Hargon
title: Greedy Navigator
abilityText: Choose 2 non-fracture systems that each contain your or neutral units. Your ships treat the chosen systems as adjacent to one another during this tactical action.

name: Sun
title: Court of Steel
abilityText: You may repair 1 of your units participating in that combat. Players cannot use BOMBARDMENT against your coexisting units.
unlockCondition: Have units on 3 planets that have different traits, and 1 legendary planet.

name: Londor II
title: God Emperor
abilityWindow: After you activate a non-home system:
abilityText: You may purge this card to treat each of your units as adjacent to the active system until the end of this tactical action.

name: Pharad'n the Immortal
title: Imperishable Unifier
abilityWindow: After a player commits ground forces to a planet that contains 1 of your structures
abilityText: You may purge this card to destroy all infantry on that planet, or commit any number of your captured infantry to that planet as if they were your own.

name: Tvor Khage
title: Shield of Qhet
abilityText: Place this card near the game board; until the end of this game round, when you win a combat, if your opponent has a control token on your faction sheet, remove 1 of your command tokens from the active system, if able. At the end of this game round, purge this card.

name: Spike
title: The Reaper
abilityText: You may exhaust this card; if you do, during this combat, hits produced by your fighters' ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE are instead produced against all ships (not just fighters). After you lose a combat, ready this card.

name: Kapoko Vui
title: Great Spirit
abilityText: You may purge this card to commit any of your ships in the active system to planets as if they were ground forces; those units participate in combat. At the end of this tactical action, return those ships to the space area of the active system.

name: Jodekan-Jodar
title: Prince of Kaltrim
abilityText: For each player that has fewer scored secret objectives than you, you may look at 1 Shrine token on a planet that player controls, or gain up to 2 command tokens. Then, purge this card.

name: Tsao
title: Grand Administrator
abilityName: Harmonic Resonance - Stone, Sky, and Flame
abilityText: For each player who controls a planet that contains your units, you may resolve the secondary ability of 1 of their strategy cards without spending a command token, or look at their hand of secret objectives. Then, purge this card.

name: Cardossa Flight
title: Pirate Queen
abilityText: Exhaust this card to place 1 neutral war sun in a system that contains neutral units or move 1 neutral ship to an adjacent system; resolve space combat in that system. Neutral war suns have the abilities on the Leviathan ability card.

name: Acamont
title: Concordat Marshall
abilityText: Attach this card to a revealed objective. A player with the fewest victory points may score this objective without fulfilling its requirements; after a player scores this objective, the Toldar player may draw 1 secret objective.
